pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at some discrepancies from our recent audit at the Rotterdam facility. We're seeing small mismatches between the WMS and the physical counts for these specific electronic components. Can you help me look at these numbers and suggest what might be causing the shrinkage?

SKU-9928 (Micro-Controller A): System 450, Physical 447
SKU-4412 (Resistor Pack B): System 1200, Physical 1192
SKU-0039 (Capacitor C): System 85, Physical 83
SKU-7721 (Voltage Regulator): System 310, Physical 308

The counts are consistently slightly lower than the digital records.
pool.message:

pool.baseline:

2023-10-27 14:22:01 [ERROR] [POST] /api/v1/checkout/process - Connection timeout during database write
2023-10-27 14:22:03 [ERROR] [POST] /api/v1/checkout/process - Unexpected token in JSON at position 42

2023-10-27 14:22:10 [WARN]  [POST] /api/v1/checkout/process - Retrying database connection...

any idea what's going on? it's super inconsistent.
